items.summary: Remove the chat/ticket history section (ServiceHistoryTimeline and any related 'History' tab) from the CustomerDashboard and ClientPortal entirely. The tab and its contents should not appear in the customer-facing UI.

Disable any automatic scroll-to-top behavior on both the CustomerDashboard and ExpertDashboard panels. When switching tabs or navigating within these dashboards, the page/panel should remain at its current scroll position.

Remove the full payment requirement that blocks ticket creation in TicketCreationForm. Replace it with a minimum fixed charge of $1 USD. The ticket creation flow should proceed after a $1 charge is processed, not the full session payment. Eliminate any logic that enforces the full payment script before ticket submission.
